1.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry
1.kj: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurk

1.gl: to stop (usually over night); by implication, to stay permanently; hence (in a bad sense) to be obstinate (especially in words, to complain)

1.gl: a cover (in a good or a bad, a literal or a figurative sense)
1.kj: backbiting, covering, covert, [idiom] disguise(-th), hiding place, privily, protection, secret(-ly, place).

1.gl: an elevation, i.e. (adj.) lofty (compar.); as title, the Supreme

2.kj: answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

2.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
2.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

2.gl: figuratively, to trust, be confident or sure
2.kj: be bold (confident, secure, sure), careless (one, woman), put confidence, (make to) hope, (put, make to) trust.
2.dv: a primitive root; properly, to hide for refuge (but not so precipitately as H2620 (חָסָה));

2.gl: a net, or (abstractly) capture; also a fastness
2.kj: castle, defense, fort(-ress), (strong) hold, be hunted, net, snare, strong place.
2.dv: or (feminine) מְצוּדָה; or מְצֻדָה; for H4685 (מָצוֹד);

2.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
2.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

3.gl: by implication, of falling); desire; also ruin
3.kj: calamity, iniquity, mischief, mischievous (thing), naughtiness, naughty, noisome, perverse thing, substance, very wickedness.
3.dv: from H1933 (הָוָא) (in the sense of eagerly coveting and rushing upon;

3.gl: to snatch away, whether in a good or a bad sense
3.kj: [idiom] at all, defend, deliver (self), escape, [idiom] without fail, part, pluck, preserve, recover, rescue, rid, save, spoil, strip, [idiom] surely, take (out).

3.gl: properly, entangled, i.e. by implication (intransitively) a snare, or (transitive) a snarer
a (metallic) sheet (as pounded thin); also a spring net (as spread out like a lamina)

3.dv: from H1696 (דָבַר) (in the sense of destroying);

4.gl: an edge or extremity; specifically (of a bird or army) a wing, (of a garment or bedclothing) a flap, (of the earth) a quarter, (of a building) a pinnacle
4.kj: [phrase] bird, border, corner, end, feather(-ed), [idiom] flying, [phrase] (one an-) other, overspreading, [idiom] quarters, skirt, [idiom] sort, uttermost part, wing(-ed).

4.gl: the bottom (as depressed); only adverbially, below (often with prepositional prefix underneath), in lieu of, etc.
4.kj: as, beneath, [idiom] flat, in(-stead), (same) place (where...is), room, for...sake, stead of, under, [idiom] unto, [idiom] when...was mine, whereas, (where-) fore, with.

4.gl: properly, to entwine as ascreen; by implication, to fence in, cover over, (figuratively) protect
4.kj: cover, defence, defend, hedge in, join together, set, shut up.
assured(-ly), establishment, faithful, right, sure, true (-ly, -th), verity.

4.gl: a hook (as pointed); also a (large) shield (as if guarding by prickliness); also cold (as piercing)
to flee for protection; figuratively, to confide in

5.gl: to fly; also (by implication of dimness) to faint (from the darkness of swooning)
5.kj: brandish, be (wax) faint, flee away, fly (away), [idiom] set, shine forth, weary.
5.dv: a primitive root; to cover (with wings or obscurity); hence (as denominative from H5775 (עוֹף))

5.dv: from H2686 (חָצַץ); also by interchange for H6086 (עֵץ)

from an unused root meaning to cut off;

9.gl: an elevation, i.e. (adj.) lofty (compar.); as title, the Supreme

appoint, (for-) bid, (give a) charge, (give a, give in, send with) command(-er, -ment), send a messenger, put, (set) in order.

11.gl: a messenger; specifically, of God, i.e. an angel (also a prophet, priest or teacher)
